title: Public Safety: Fear & Contracts
description: Join Public Safety. Hunt devils born from fear. Make contracts that hurt. Become something worse than human, or die as one.
body:
![modtitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a3432c6e584408b62f12ba3d05dd7931d5cdbc1.png)

**Public Safety: Fear & Contracts** is a Chainsaw Man-inspired survival mod about devils, contracts, fiends, hybrids, and a world that does not wait for you.

---

Devils showed up.

People died. Reports were filed.  
Then everyone went back to work.

Life goes on.

It always does.

---

This mod does not hand you power.

It gives you a world.

Devils can appear naturally. Public Safety can intervene. Contracts can be made. Things can go wrong while you are busy farming wheat.

You can ignore all of it.

_Mostly._

---

## Features

- **Devils** born from fear.
- **Contracts** with real costs.
- **Fiends** and **hybrids**.
- **Public Safety encounters**.
- **Rare structures**.
- **Unique entities**.
- **Survival-first design**.

---

Fear has a body here.

Sometimes it looks like darkness.  
Sometimes it looks like hunger.  
Sometimes it looks like something already standing outside your house.

Not every devil is waiting in a boss room.

Some are just part of the world now.

---

Power is easy.

Paying for it is the problem.

A contract can save your life.

That does not mean it was a good deal.

---

There is a headquarters.

Deep ocean.

You will not stumble into it.

Someone runs it.  
Someone has been watching longer than you think.

If you prove useful, a crow with golden eyes may find you one day.

There will be a letter.

You can say no.

She will not ask twice.

---

Some things in this world are unique.

One devil.  
One contract.  
One body.  
One mistake.

The strongest hunter is usually just the biggest target.

That is kind of funny.

If you think about it.

---

**Public Safety: Fear & Contracts is Chainsaw Man built for Minecraft. Not Minecraft rebuilt around Chainsaw Man.**

**NeoForge 1.21.1**
